subject: feat(chart): move legend bottom, hide toolbar, x-zoom only, hover markers
body:
Cleaner chart appearance: legend below chart (centered), toolbar hidden,
zoom restricted to x-axis drag, and subtle hover-only markers for
interaction feedback without visual clutter.
